creator: koobs.freebsd@gmail.com
text:
The friendly folks on #x264 (FreeNode) are assisting, and have requested
the following information as nobody has access to ia64 hardware:

- config.log output (from configure)
- config.h and config.mak
- math.h

And if possible:

- pre-processor output

They have also identified a couple of commits that might be relevant or
related, so I'm adding them here for reference:

http://git.videolan.org/?p=x264.git;a=commitdiff;h=d355878be5616dc871058cb931b281b1d5cfbfbc

http://git.videolan.org/?p=x264.git;a=commitdiff;h=3f3343abfba8a2377a66b6a7f7a8c564ade86bc6

Lastly, if you could confirm reproduction of the issue with the latest
version of the x264 port that would be great.

Koobs
